proves: Internal claim-governance rules and acceptance thresholds are explicit.
Current sample fixtures are kept separate from buyer-facing accuracy proof.
World-class prediction language has active release holds until real evidence exists.
does_not_prove: Prediction accuracy on real buyer or production outcomes.
Resolved-outcome calibration on an owner-approved export.
Hosted calibration or hosted evaluation-table security.
External benchmark superiority over human, community, pro, or AI baselines.
Buyer acceptance, willingness to pay, or world-class prediction performance.

current_source_alignment.alignment: Use future-event, contamination-resistant forecast capture and human comparison groups before any world-class AI forecasting claim.
Treat leakage avoidance and expert/human benchmark comparison as scientific evaluation requirements.
Continuously updated AI forecasting benchmarks compare AI forecasts with human and bot baselines over resolved real-world questions.
Use high-quality decision-relevant questions, scoring rules, and temporal controls before market-facing AI accuracy claims.
Map forecast claims to governed measurement and managed-risk evidence, not unqualified promotional language.

claim_governance_rules.requirement: Do not use world-class accurate predictions language unless every world-class acceptance gate passes with real resolved outcomes, real baselines, hosted proof, and owner approval.
Sample fixtures prove mechanics only and cannot support buyer-facing accuracy, superiority, or reliability claims.
Resolved forecast and baseline inputs must pass schema, timestamp, source, sample-size, placeholder, and comparability checks before calibration or benchmark scoring can support any market claim.
Calibration ledger and benchmark comparison outputs must pass sample-size, reliability-bin, baseline-source, input-validation, and leakage-review gates before accuracy claim review.
Every scored forecast must be timestamped before resolution with pre-registered outcome criteria, exclusion rules, source_id, and workflow version.
Baseline comparisons must use the same questions and timestamps, or a documented comparable mapping with source URLs and leakage review.
Report Brier score, Brier skill versus baseline, reliability bins, sample size, coverage/exclusions, and caveats together.
Report domain slices, weak slices, exclusions, leakage flags, and representative misses before broad market claims.
Hosted calibration and evaluation-table security proof must exist before operational buyer claims.

acceptance_thresholds.required_evidence: Sample ledger, sample benchmark comparison, forecast evaluation protocol, and accuracy intake kit are generated and JSON-valid.
acceptance_thresholds.allowed_claim: Forecast scoring and benchmark-comparison mechanics exist locally.
acceptance_thresholds.prohibited_claim: The app is accurate, superior, calibrated in production, or world-class.

acceptance_thresholds.required_evidence: Forecast scoring validator passes against approved calibration ledger, benchmark comparison, input validation, and leakage review artifacts.
acceptance_thresholds.allowed_claim: Scoring outputs are ready for owner claim review.
acceptance_thresholds.prohibited_claim: Sample scoring outputs prove prediction accuracy or benchmark superiority.

acceptance_thresholds.required_evidence: At least 50 owner-approved pre-resolution resolved outcomes or an owner-approved smaller pilot sample with explicit caveat; Brier score, reliability bins, coverage/exclusion report, leakage review, and comparison with trivial/internal baselines.
acceptance_thresholds.allowed_claim: Internal pilot accuracy has been measured on the named sample.
acceptance_thresholds.prohibited_claim: External superiority or world-class prediction accuracy.

acceptance_thresholds.required_evidence: At least 100 owner-approved resolved outcomes or a reviewer-approved benchmark sample; real human/community/pro/external baseline mapping; leakage/contamination review; confidence intervals or bootstrap caveats.
acceptance_thresholds.allowed_claim: Compares against named external baselines on the documented sample.

acceptance_thresholds.required_evidence: Repeated benchmark superiority across decision-relevant domains, independent review, real comparable human/community/pro baselines, calibration reliability, hosted/RLS/security proof, and approved buyer-safe claim language.
acceptance_thresholds.allowed_claim: No world-class claim is currently allowed.

release_holds.evidence_needed: Validated owner-approved forecast and baseline inputs with pre-resolution timestamps, resolution criteria, exclusion review, source URLs, and comparable baseline metadata.
Owner-approved export of pre-resolution forecasts and resolved outcomes.
Comparable human/community/pro/market or external baselines with source URLs and timestamps.

Adversarial leakage/contamination review for scored forecasts and baseline mapping is not ready; docs/launch-readiness/forecast-leakage-review-validation-2026-06-06.json status is forecast_leakage_review_validation_ready_no_real_forecast_rows with 0/8 controls ready and 5 active validation holds.

Forecast scoring evidence validation is not ready; docs/launch-readiness/forecast-scoring-evidence-validation-2026-06-06.json status is forecast_scoring_evidence_validation_sample_only_not_claim_proof with 7 active holds.
Hosted calibration smoke, RLS/evaluation-table proof, and redacted hosted evidence.
Owner-approved claim tier and copy review before external use.

required_owner_inputs: Approve or edit the minimum sample size and pilot caveat threshold.
Provide an owner-approved resolved forecast export made before resolution.
Provide real comparable baseline rows or approve a documented comparable mapping.
Run accuracy input validation and clear row-level schema, timestamp, source, sample-size, placeholder, and comparability issues before scoring.

Fill and pass the leakage/contamination review register for pre-resolution timestamps, source cutoffs, retrieval cutoffs, baseline comparability, benchmark contamination, training/evaluation overlap, ambiguous outcomes, and claim-tier copy boundaries.
Run forecast scoring evidence validation after calibration ledger and benchmark comparison outputs are generated.
Identify resolution-source URLs and exclusion rules for every scored question.
Approve hosted calibration/security smoke scope before operational buyer claims.
Approve the exact market language tier before outreach or buyer decks.

checklist.required_evidence: Sample ledger, sample benchmark comparison, forecast evaluation protocol, and accuracy intake kit are generated and JSON-valid.
checklist.allowed_claim: Forecast scoring and benchmark-comparison mechanics exist locally.
checklist.prohibited_claim: The app is accurate, superior, calibrated in production, or world-class.

checklist.allowed_claim: Scoring outputs are ready for owner claim review.
checklist.prohibited_claim: Sample scoring outputs prove prediction accuracy or benchmark superiority.

checklist.required_evidence: At least 50 owner-approved pre-resolution resolved outcomes or an owner-approved smaller pilot sample with explicit caveat; Brier score, reliability bins, coverage/exclusion report, leakage review, and comparison with trivial/internal baselines.
checklist.allowed_claim: Internal pilot accuracy has been measured on the named sample.
checklist.prohibited_claim: External superiority or world-class prediction accuracy.

checklist.required_evidence: At least 100 owner-approved resolved outcomes or a reviewer-approved benchmark sample; real human/community/pro/external baseline mapping; leakage/contamination review; confidence intervals or bootstrap caveats.
checklist.allowed_claim: Compares against named external baselines on the documented sample.

checklist.required_evidence: Repeated benchmark superiority across decision-relevant domains, independent review, real comparable human/community/pro baselines, calibration reliability, hosted/RLS/security proof, and approved buyer-safe claim language.
checklist.allowed_claim: No world-class claim is currently allowed.
